implementation_notes: Added 4 lines to autobuild.py after 'player_result = recovered_player_result' (line 1855) to write the recovered data to disk via self._agent_invoker._write_direct_mode_results(). Guarded with 'if self._agent_invoker is not None' to handle the lazy-init case. This ensures the Coach validator reads the correct synthetic data from task_work_results.json instead of the stale error data left by the exception handler.
requirements_addressed: After state recovery succeeds, write recovered player_result data to task_work_results.json on disk so Coach validator reads it instead of stale error data

completion_promises.criterion_text: State recovery must write task_work_results.json to disk after recovery succeeds
completion_promises.evidence: Added call to self._agent_invoker._write_direct_mode_results(task_id, player_result.report, success=True) immediately after player_result = recovered_player_result in the state recovery success branch of _execute_turn(). Guarded with None check on _agent_invoker.
